title: [TACZ] Remoove recipe gun
description: Removes the crafting of TACZ weapons and some addons.
body:
Removes the crafting recipes for TACZ weapons, as well as for certain addons.

This mod is especially useful for adventure maps that limit crafting, or for roleplay servers.
For example, on an RP server, players must find weapons in chests or purchase them, allowing for better control and gameplay balance.

A version also exists for SBW and VPB.


⚠️Ammunition recipes are not removed!

⚠️Weapons are still available in Creative Mode.

⚠️This mod requires the mod "[TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero".

List of affected addons:

- Tacz default gun
- Apocalypse Gun Pack
- Ares Gun Pack
- LesRaisins Append Pack
- Suffuse GunSmoke
- Gunpowder Revolution: Great War Gunpack
- [TacZ]Cold War Guns for TacZ
- And very very more (53 addons and 4 mods)
